errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.generic: Something unexpected happened. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.message: You do not have permission to view this page.

serverError.title: Server error
serverError.message: The server hit an unexpected problem. Try again in a moment.

offline.title: You are offline
offline.message: You are currently offline. Your changes will sync when you reconnect.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
